title: Software Update - DFU - Three easy steps screen
scenario: "Start Update" button is missing or inactive on the "Three easy steps" screen during software update flow in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the desired device name to open Device Settings
Observe the 'Three easy steps' screen with picture and textual instructions
expected: The 'Three easy steps' screen is displayed with a picture and textual instructions, and the 'Start Update' button is available and active (tappable).
